subject: fix(icons): use brand tokens (primary/secondary/accent) not status tokens
body:
Replace info (#00bafe) and warning (#fcb700) with secondary (#f43098
pink) and accent (#00d3bb teal). Status tokens (info, warning, error,
success) communicate meaning — using them decoratively in an icon is
a misuse of the semantic system. Brand tokens (primary, secondary,
accent) are designed for visual identity.

Tags: icons, theme, daisyui, semantic-tokens
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: theme-dark-mode
Semver: patch
